revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"
revision.text: {{SAFESUBST:<noinclude />#invoke:Unsubst||date=__DATE__ |$B= <!--{{Verify source}} begin-->{{Fix | link = Wikipedia:Verifiability | text = {{{type|}}} verification needed | title = {{{reason|The material near this tag needs to be fact-checked with the cited source(s).}}} | date = {{{date|}}} | cat = [[Category:All pages needing factual verification]] | cat-date = Category:Wikipedia articles needing factual verification}}<!--{{Verify source}} end--> }}<noinclude> {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] </noinclude> [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 2 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23692667944|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{SAFESUBST:<noinclude />#invoke:Unsubst||date=__DATE__ |$B= <!--{{Verify source}} begin-->{{Fix | link = Wikipedia:Verifiability | text = {{{type|}}} verification needed | title = {{{reason|The material near this tag needs to be fact-checked with the cited source(s).}}} | date = {{{date|}}} | cat = | cat-date = Category:Wikipedia articles needing factual verification}}<!--{{Verify source}} end--> }}<noinclude> {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] </noinclude> <noinclude> [[Category:All pages needing factual verification]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

{{SAFESUBST:<noinclude />#invoke:Unsubst||date=__DATE__ |$B= <!--{{Verify source}} begin-->{{Fix | link = Wikipedia:Verifiability | text = {{{type|}}} verification needed | title = {{{reason|The material near this tag needs to be fact-checked with the cited source(s).}}} | date = {{{date|}}} | cat = | cat-date = Category:Wikipedia articles needing factual verification}}<!--{{Verify source}} end--> }}<noinclude> {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]
[[Category:All pages needing factual verification]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24999656626|time triggered pipeline]]
